news.title: Trump says government gave 'final' bailout proposal for Spirit Airlines as liquidation looms
news.summary: Talks with bondholders for a government bailout this week have not yet yielded a deal.

news.title: Trump says he will hike tariffs on EU cars to 25%
news.summary: The current level of tariffs charged on goods entering the US from the EU is 15%, under a deal negotiated last July.
